posts.author: ncritzlane (Nicki Critz-Lane)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are trying to integrate with HaloITSM to create tickets from tasks in Monday.com then also when the ticket has been updated in HaloITSM automatically update the Monday.com task.

I have been able to create a ticket in HaloITSM from a task in Monday when it is created using zapier however it is very static and not very dynamic. A true integration would be absolutely amazing.

Please vote for this.
